name: EX-T10-EM "Executor" Torpedo
description:
Manufacturer: Behring
Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic
Size: 10

Behring prides itself on crafting ordnance that is as dependable as it is powerful and the EX-T10 "Executor" is no exception. Designed as an anti-ship and anti-installation weapon, Behring engineers worked tirelessly to ensure this torpedo was a bold strategic statement.
